calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing For Plaintiff'S Judgment By The Court As To Defendant Pierce Lathing Co.
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Geoff T. Sloniker, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CINDY E. LINDLEY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PIERCE LATHING CO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

It is ordered, adjudged and Decreed that Judgment be entered for Plaintiff CIDY E. LINDLEY and against Defendant PIERCE LATHING CO. for interest in the amount of $$3,643.84; Further, IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that plaintiff is awarded costs in the amount of $560.00;
The total amount of the Judgment is $4,203.84.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
